name: pipedrive-mcp
description: Local MCP server for Pipedrive CRM operations in Claude Desktop.
long_description: Pipedrive MCP gives Claude Desktop a local connector for Pipedrive CRM read workflows and opt-in write workflows. Configure your Pipedrive company domain and an API or OAuth access token in the extension settings after installation. Enter only the company subdomain, not the full Pipedrive URL. The packaged server runs with Claude Desktop's integrated extension runtime; Cowork requires a separately deployed remote MCP connector.

company_domain.title: Pipedrive company domain
company_domain.description: Company subdomain used for https://<company>.pipedrive.com. Enter only the company name, not the full URL.

base_url.title: Pipedrive base URL
base_url.description: Optional explicit https://*.pipedrive.com base URL. Leave empty to derive it from the company domain.

api_token.title: Pipedrive API token
api_token.description: Pipedrive API token for standard CRM API access. Provide this or an OAuth access token.

access_token.title: Pipedrive OAuth access token
access_token.description: Optional OAuth access token. Some endpoints, especially Mailbox, may require OAuth scopes.

enable_writes.title: Enable write tools
enable_writes.description: Register create and update tools. Write calls still default to dry-run.

enable_mailbox_tools.title: Enable Mailbox tools
enable_mailbox_tools.description: Register Mailbox read tools. Linking a thread also requires write tools.

enable_delete_tools.title: Enable delete tools
enable_delete_tools.description: Register delete tools. Requires write tools to be enabled.

request_timeout_ms.title: Request timeout
request_timeout_ms.description: Pipedrive API request timeout in milliseconds.
